summary: Completed frontend testing for cart drawer overlay fix in Restaurant QR Menu app. All cart drawer interactions verified successfully.
passed_tests: Cart drawer opens successfully when clicking cart button
Cart drawer + button increases item quantity from 1 to 2 (verified quantity display and total price update)
Cart drawer - button decreases item quantity from 2 to 1 (verified quantity display update)
Remove button successfully removes items from cart
Adding new items to cart while drawer is accessible works correctly
Backdrop click closes cart drawer as expected
Cart badge displays correct item count
Cart drawer z-index fix working correctly (backdrop z-0, drawer z-10)
